anti_patterns.name: unsafe blocks
anti_patterns.rule: Zero tolerance for unsafe. No exceptions.

anti_patterns.name: pkill chain
anti_patterns.rule: NEVER chain after pkill — exit 144 kills && chains

anti_patterns.name: cp alias
anti_patterns.rule: Always \cp -f — cp is aliased to interactive mode

anti_patterns.name: JSON to RM
anti_patterns.rule: Reasoning Memory uses TSV format ONLY, never JSON

anti_patterns.name: stdout in daemon
anti_patterns.rule: Never write to stdout in daemons — SIGPIPE kills (BUG-018)

anti_patterns.name: git status -uall
anti_patterns.rule: Causes memory issues on large repos

anti_patterns.name: global k_mod
anti_patterns.rule: Never modify k_mod without consent gate and per-sphere option

anti_patterns.name: byte slice truncation
anti_patterns.rule: UTF-8 byte slicing panics on multi-byte chars

anti_patterns.name: unbounded Vec for logs
anti_patterns.rule: Use VecDeque with cap, not growing Vec

anti_patterns.name: unconditional dirty flag
anti_patterns.rule: Warmup dirty tautology — check condition first

anti_patterns.name: variable weight exponent
anti_patterns.rule: Use fixed w² not 1+k_mod variable exponent (M12 bug)

anti_patterns.name: no heartbeat check
anti_patterns.rule: Spheres with heartbeat=0.0 must be swept immediately

anti_patterns.name: code modification without reading
anti_patterns.rule: ALWAYS read a file before modifying it
